title: Heightened-perception trigger
html:
The vibrancy-question Yahir asks himself: "What makes the colors more vibrant, the food taste better, the sounds sharper?"

Recurrences

  • Origin: 2022 05 14 have trouble being honest about myself — first articulation of the question.
  • 2024 08 22 untitled — the two-state oscillation (aggressively alive ↔ Blade-Runner-on-missions) — naming the absence of the heightened state.
  • 2024 09 12 never forget you can do whatever the fuck you want — "the internal flame within you is always alive, be with people and do things that make it rage."
  • 2024 12 14 departing china — "beauty in the unknown, uncomfortable, and in the transformation of a new normal."
  • 2025 10 14 untitled — "feral strength and manic focus."

Why it matters

  • Yahir consistently treats perception-intensity as the deliverable — what makes life worth living vs. merely transiting through. Pairs with normal neutral to everything (the failure mode) and walk with gods eyes (the opt-in active form).
  • The trigger gets named differently across years (vibrancy → flame → soul fire → feral focus) but the underlying somatic phenomenon is the same.

Wikilinks

normal neutral to everything · walk with gods eyes · soul as beacon · magnetic aura · 2022 05 14 have trouble being honest about myself · 2024 08 22 untitled · 2024 09 12 never forget you can do whatever the fuck you want
